name: BlackJack Math Trainer
short_description: Level up your BlackJack mathematic skills along with discovering many secrets, features and challenges!
detailed_description:
You are an aspiring student of the gamble and have decided to participate in a most peculiar local custom: practicing arithmetic for the casino card game Blackjack.

Training Mode

Training mode is a simulation of sitting at the BlackJack being dealt cards and being asked to add them together as they come out. This goes on until the dealer's total reaches 17 or over to which another round begins. All of this must be done before the timer runs out.

  • Race against the clock entering in the totals of the drawn cards!

  • Convert your score into chips to use in BlackJack Mode or in the unlockables store!

  • Discover random slot-like features that drop with unique audio cues that can turn the tables around!

  • Compete on the leaderboards!

  • Unlock A Number of Challenging Achievements!

  • Witness hidden table-styles that change the flow of the game and provide their own set of challenges!

BlackJack Mode

A 1v1 scenario against a dealer. Gamble with the score accumulated in training mode.

  • Hit / Stand strategically against the dealer

  • Constant updates and community driven development

Unlockables

  • Purchase the ability to upload your very own art to the background or card backs.

Bonus Features

  • BlackJack Fireball Feature - Hit a BlackJack and have fireballs strike your score for more points at random multiplier between 1-8x

  • 678 Combo Feature - Get a 6, 7 and an 8 in one hand for a dramatic score payout.

  • And more hidden features!

Take a seat and let's get to practice!
